name: Rustic Charm Lamp
description: A stunning rustic lamp that brings warmth and character to any space. Features a unique design with natural textures and earthy tones. Perfect for creating a cozy ambiance in living rooms, bedrooms, or study areas. Handcrafted with attention to detail.
careGuide: Clean with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid using harsh chemicals. Keep away from direct sunlight to prevent fading. Use LED bulbs for optimal performance and energy efficiency.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. Express delivery available for metro cities.

name: Modern Elegance Lamp
description: A beautifully crafted lamp that combines modern design with rustic charm. Perfect for adding ambient lighting to any room. Made with premium materials and attention to detail, this lamp will be a statement piece in your home decor.
careGuide: Clean with a soft, dry cloth. Avoid using harsh chemicals. Keep away from direct sunlight to prevent fading. For optimal performance, use LED bulbs.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. Express delivery available for metro cities.

name: Contemporary Style Lamp
description: An elegant and sophisticated lamp design that brings warmth and style to your living space. Features a unique base design and premium finish. Ideal for bedside tables, study desks, or as a decorative accent piece.
careGuide: Dust regularly with a microfiber cloth. Use mild soap and water for deeper cleaning. Ensure the lamp is unplugged before cleaning. Replace bulbs as needed.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on all orders. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Express delivery: 1-2 business days (metro cities only).

name: Artistic Designer Lamp
description: A stunning contemporary lamp that blends functionality with artistic design. Perfect for modern interiors, this lamp features a unique silhouette and premium materials. Creates the perfect ambiance for any setting.
careGuide: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners. Keep in a dry place. Use compatible bulbs as specified in the product manual.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2500. Standard delivery: 4-6 business days. Express delivery available.

name: Minimalist Modern Lamp
description: A sleek and minimalist lamp design that complements contemporary interiors. Features clean lines and a sophisticated aesthetic. Perfect for modern homes and offices. Provides excellent lighting while serving as a stylish decor piece.
careGuide: Clean with a soft microfiber cloth. Avoid water contact with electrical components. Use recommended wattage bulbs. Keep away from heat sources.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2500. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Express delivery available for select cities.

name: Glow Arc Pendant Lamp
description: An arc-shaped pendant lamp with a smooth matte finish, designed to hang over dining tables or reading nooks. The curved silhouette creates a soft halo effect that's as beautiful unlit as it is glowing.
careGuide: Wipe with a dry microfiber cloth. Do not use wet cloths near the cord or bulb fitting. Hang on a sturdy hook rated for 500g.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: Terra Glow Table Lamp
description: Earth-toned 3D-printed lamp with a terracotta-inspired palette. The geometric lattice pattern casts stunning shadow patterns on your walls. A conversation-starter for any boho or earthy interior.
careGuide: Dust gently with a dry cloth. Avoid placing near high-humidity areas. Use bulbs under 15W for best shadow effects.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: Lunar Night Lamp
description: Inspired by the moon's craters and surface, this night lamp casts a warm celestial glow. Ideal as a bedside lamp, nursery light, or a thoughtful gift. Printed in translucent filament for maximum diffusion.
careGuide: Clean with a soft dry cloth only. Protect from drops. Use a 5W LED bulb for optimal moon-like effect.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on all orders. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: Multi-Purpose Desk Organizer
description: A beautifully designed organizer that helps you keep your space tidy and organized. Features multiple compartments and a sleek design that complements any decor style. Perfect for desks, shelves, or countertops.
careGuide: Clean with a soft cloth and mild detergent. Avoid soaking in water. Dry thoroughly after cleaning. Store in a cool, dry place.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1500. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Express delivery available for select cities.

name: Premium Storage Organizer
description: An elegant storage solution that combines form and function. This organizer features a modern design with ample storage space. Ideal for organizing office supplies, cosmetics, or small accessories.
careGuide: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Use mild soap for stubborn stains. Avoid using harsh chemicals. Keep away from direct heat sources.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery: 4-6 business days. Express delivery available.

name: TISTWO Tissue Box Organizer
description: A stylish tissue box organizer with hidden magnets for secure placement. Features a modern design that blends seamlessly with any decor. Keeps tissues easily accessible while maintaining a clean, organized look.
careGuide: Clean with a damp cloth. Avoid excessive moisture. Magnets are strong - handle with care. Suitable for standard tissue box sizes.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1500. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Lightweight and easy to install.

name: THALOR Kitchen Tissue Holder
description: A practical kitchen tissue holder designed for convenience and style. Features easy mounting and quick tissue access. Perfect for kitchens, dining areas, or bathrooms. Durable construction ensures long-lasting use.
careGuide: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Avoid harsh chemicals. Easy to install and remove. Compatible with standard paper towel rolls.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Includes mounting hardware.

name: StackDesk Pro Organizer
description: A modular stacking desk organizer system with interlocking tiers. Configure it as a pen caddy, cable manager, or card holder — all in one elegant unit. Printed in smooth matte PLA for a professional look.
careGuide: Wipe with a dry or slightly damp cloth. Do not immerse in water. Avoid placing near radiators.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: Cable Den Desk Tidy
description: Tame the cable chaos on your desk with this wall-mountable or freestanding cable organizer. Hidden routing channels keep USB, power, and headphone cables neat and tangle-free. Minimal design suits any workspace.
careGuide: Wipe clean. Do not apply pressure to cable slots. Compatible with cables up to 6mm diameter.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: MagBase Tissue Caddy
description: Magnetic-base tissue caddy that stays put on metallic surfaces — fridges, filing cabinets, whiteboards. A clean alternative to plastic holders, printed in a range of matte finishes. Gift-ready packaging included.
careGuide: Wipe with a damp cloth. Magnets are strong — keep away from credit cards. Fits standard 200-pull tissue boxes.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: Counter Caddy Kitchen Holder
description: Keep your kitchen counter clutter-free with this slim and practical caddy. Holds paper towels, spatulas, and small utensils in one spot. Weighted base prevents tipping. Dishwasher safe.
careGuide: Dishwasher safe on the top rack. Avoid high temperatures. Check stability before placing heavy items.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: CACTIA Cactus Planter
description: A charming cactus-themed planter perfect for succulents and small plants. Features a unique design that adds personality to any space. Made with durable materials and excellent drainage. Ideal for indoor gardening enthusiasts.
careGuide: Clean regularly to prevent buildup. Ensure proper drainage. Use a saucer to protect surfaces. Perfect for cacti and succulents. Suitable for indoor use.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Handle with care during unpacking.

name: STEMRA Stackable Planter Set
description: Innovative stackable planters that maximize vertical space. Perfect for creating a living wall or herb garden. Features modular design for flexible arrangements. Ideal for small spaces and urban gardening.
careGuide: Clean with mild soap and water. Ensure proper drainage in each tier. Stack securely on a stable surface. Suitable for herbs, flowers, and small plants.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery: 4-6 business days. Includes stacking hardware.

name: Artisan Geometric Planter
description: A beautiful geometric planter that brings nature into your home. Crafted with care, this planter is perfect for indoor plants and adds a touch of greenery to any space. Features excellent drainage and a timeless faceted design. NOTE: original .heic images pending conversion — currently showing alternate display images.
careGuide: Clean regularly to prevent buildup. Ensure proper drainage. Use a saucer to protect surfaces. Avoid overwatering. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on all orders. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Handle with care during unpacking.

name: Herb Tower Planter
description: A tall tower planter with three self-watering pockets — perfect for growing basil, mint, and coriander on your kitchen windowsill. The modular tiers can be removed for easy harvesting. Compact and lightweight.
careGuide: Rinse with water to clean. Ensure bottom drainage hole is clear. Not suitable for outdoor use in heavy rain. Best for herbs and trailing plants.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1200. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days.

name: Wall Bloom Hanging Planter
description: Mount it, hang it, or set it on a shelf — this versatile planter works three ways. The integrated hanger is load-tested for 1.5kg. Comes in warm terracotta-inspired tones that look gorgeous with trailing pothos or string-of-pearls.
careGuide: Wipe clean. Ensure wall anchor is secure before hanging. Not suitable for plants heavier than 1.5kg.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹1000. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Wall anchors included.

name: Urban Pocket Pot Set
description: A set of two minimalist pocket pots for desk succulents or air plants. The slim silhouette takes up barely any desk real estate, while the built-in drainage keeps your plants happy. A great gifting option.
careGuide: Rinse with clean water. Suitable for succulents and air plants only. Avoid direct outdoor sun for extended periods.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on orders above ₹800. Standard delivery: 3-5 business days. Set of 2 pots.

name: Terrace Trio Planter Bundle
description: Three graduating-size planters sold as a bundle — small for succulents, medium for herbs, large for a statement monstera. Designed to stack or display in a row. A popular housewarming gift.
careGuide: Clean with mild soap and water. Ensure drainage holes are clear. Bundle includes three matching saucers.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on all orders above ₹2000. Standard delivery: 4-6 business days. Bundle packed securely.

name: Geo Fern Floor Planter
description: A bold geometric floor planter that makes a statement in hallways, living corners, and entryways. Its 30cm height is ideal for ferns, fiddle-leaf figs, or tall ornamental grasses. Printed in weather-resistant PETG.
careGuide: Wipe clean with a damp cloth. Suitable for indoor and covered outdoor use. Use a saucer to protect flooring. Supports up to 3kg of soil.
shippingInfo: Free shipping on all orders. Standard delivery: 5-7 business days. Packed in reinforced box.
